name: Whipped Smoked Cod Roe
steps: Peel skin off Cod roe, Blend in thermo with lemon juice on speed 10 for 1 minute until smooth
Reduce speed to 1-2, pour the oil in a thin gentle stream to emulsify the oil into the cod roe
When all the oil is combined turn to speed up to 10 for 1 minute to ensure it's smooth
Season and pass through a chinois
Store in piping bags and use the small star nozzle for service
